title: choisya ternata
intro: Choisya ternata, also known as Mexican orange blossom or Mock Orange, is a flowering evergreen shrub native to Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of limonene and other compounds. The health benefits of Choisya ternata include its ability to help alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues. Choisya ternata can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a medicinal treatment.
